all.en: This guide outlines the standard workflow for all service center agents.
all.zh: 本指引列出所有客服中心專員的標準作業流程。

all.en: Please review each step before taking calls on the live floor.
all.zh: 請於上線接聽電話前詳閱每個步驟。

all.en: Step one, log into the Genesys console using your employee ID.
all.zh: 步驟一，使用您的員工編號登入 Genesys 系統。

all.en: Confirm that your headset microphone is working and the volume is balanced.
all.zh: 確認您的耳麥麥克風運作正常，音量也已平衡。

all.en: Set your status to Available only when you finish reading the daily memo.
all.zh: 讀完每日備忘錄後再將狀態設為可服務。

all.en: Step two, greet the caller with the approved welcome script.
all.zh: 步驟二，使用核准的歡迎話術問候來電者。

all.en: State your name, the department, and ask how you can help.
all.zh: 報出您的姓名、部門，並詢問如何協助對方。

all.en: Step three, verify the customer identity using two security questions.
all.zh: 步驟三，以兩個安全問題驗證客戶身份。

all.en: Do not share any account details before identity is confirmed.
all.zh: 在身份確認前，不得提供任何帳戶資訊。

all.en: Step four, listen actively and summarize the issue back to the customer.
all.zh: 步驟四，主動聆聽並將問題複述給客戶確認。

all.en: Take notes in the CRM ticket as the conversation progresses.
all.zh: 對話進行時，請在 CRM 工單中即時記錄。

all.en: Step five, search the knowledge base for the recommended solution.
all.zh: 步驟五，於知識庫中搜尋建議的解決方案。

all.en: Use the article reference number when documenting your response.
all.zh: 記錄回覆時請註明該文章參考編號。

all.en: Step six, if the issue requires engineering, escalate via Tier Two queue.
all.zh: 步驟六，若需工程協助，請透過 Tier Two 佇列升級。

all.en: Include the device model, error code, and any screenshots received.
all.zh: 請附上裝置型號、錯誤代碼及收到的截圖。

all.en: Step seven, set a clear callback time and stick to it.
all.zh: 步驟七，明確訂出回電時間並準時履行。

all.en: Customers value reliability more than the speed of the first answer.
all.zh: 客戶重視可靠度更勝於首次回覆的速度。

all.en: Step eight, close the ticket only after the customer confirms resolution.
all.zh: 步驟八，客戶確認問題已解決後方可關閉工單。

all.en: Select the correct disposition code from the dropdown list.
all.zh: 從下拉選單中選擇正確的處理代碼。

all.en: Step nine, take a two-minute break to reset before the next call.
all.zh: 步驟九，於下通來電前休息兩分鐘調整狀態。

all.en: Stretch your shoulders and drink water to stay alert.
all.zh: 請伸展肩膀並補充水分，以保持專注。

all.en: Step ten, log all coaching feedback in the agent journal at shift end.
all.zh: 步驟十，下班前於專員日誌中記錄所有教練回饋。

all.en: Supervisors will review entries during the weekly huddle on Friday.
all.zh: 主管將於週五的週會中檢視這些紀錄。

all.en: Following these steps ensures consistent quality across every customer interaction.
all.zh: 遵循這些步驟可確保每次客戶互動的一致品質。
